title: The Anchorage Friendship Potlatch Committee is looking for volunteers. This
summary: The Anchorage Friendship Potlatch Committee is looking for volunteers. This year’s potlatch will be held on Sunday, October 19 at Begich Middle School. As in the past we expect over 600 CIRI shareholders, descendants and employees to attend. We are asking for help to help cook fish or moose, deliver...

title: Thank you for participating in the United Way Day of
summary: Thank you for participating in the United Way Day of Caring Food Drive. The Food Bank of Alaska received 335 lbs of food and $1,505 cash donations from our efforts. Total Weight 7,860 lbs. In 2007, our total weight was only 2,758 lbs. Your generosity will help Hungry Alaskans receive 27,510 meals. T...

title: CIRI announced last month it is making our office more
summary: CIRI announced last month it is making our office more sustainable with a new waste prevention and reduction program. CIRI encourages employees and visitors to recycle aluminum cans and type-1 (PETE) plastic bottles by depositing them in collection bins that are located in CIRI’s fifth floor kitchen...

title: We don’t know about lions or tigers, but CIRI apparently
summary: We don’t know about lions or tigers, but CIRI apparently has at least one bear. CIRI building workers returning to the office after Labor Day weekend spotted bear tracks across fresh pavement on the northeast corner of the CIRI parking lot.
